text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
We're here at the Arima Kinen, the final race of this year's Twinkle 
Series, and the star of the show is the Triple Crown champion, Narita 
Brian!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
We didn't get our wish to see her take on her sister, Biwa Hayahide, 
but she's ready to race for the two of them!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: However, it's also her first mix-up with racers in the senior year!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Against these top-class veterans, can she win her fifth G1 race and 
become a Five Crown champion?
Good, looks like you're focused even in a huge race like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how long I can keep steady though. My whole body's 
aching to run.

Hayahide's not here today, so that means all your opponents will be 
going after you.

Hayahide's not here today, so that means all your opponents will be 
going after you.

But knowing you, that won't be a problem. Go blow everyone away 
with some crazy running!

But knowing you, that won't be a problem. Go blow everyone away 
with some crazy running!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You don't have to tell me twice. They'll find no mercy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe… You made it after all, Narita Brian!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Only the toughest of the tough race in the Arima Kinen. But I've got 
my eyes on you alone.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And you better know it's 'cause I think you're the best! So don't you 
dare back out of our race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Like I would. You're on, Ama. Give me everything you've got.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I hope you're ready to have some fun!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: The racers are waiting in the gate.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Will the Triple Crown champion, Narita Brian, win? Or will another 
racer finally stop her? Get ready to find out as the Arima Kinen… 
begins!
